zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Washbourne於1451年出生在英國武斯特斯爾維其福德時，他的父親Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire11448歲，母親Elizabeth Knivton32歲。他於大約1474年與Joan Mitton在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾韋斯頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1517年5月16日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾維其福德享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾維其福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Washbourne于1451年出生在英国武斯特斯爾維其福德时，他的父亲Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire11448岁，母亲Elizabeth Knivton32岁。他于大约1474年与Joan Mitton在英国英格兰斯塔福爾韋斯頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1517年5月16日在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾維其福德享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾維其福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Washbourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Great and Little Washbourne (Gloucs) or Washbourne in Halwell (Devon). The variant Washburn could also be from Washburn (WR Yorks), but there is comparatively little evidence that this place yielded a surname.

variants.name: Washburn
meanings: English: habitational name from Great and Little Washbourne (Gloucestershire), or Washbourne in Halwell (Devon). The Gloucestershire placename derives from Old English wæsse (genitive wæssan) ‘wet place, swamp, marsh’ + burna ‘spring, stream’. The Devon placename derives from Old English wæsce ‘place for washing’ + burna.
History: John Washburn came to MA in 1626 and settled in Duxbury, MA, in 1632.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Washbourne was born in 1451, in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England, his father, Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire, was 11448 and his mother, Elizabeth Knivton, was 32. He married Joan Mitton about 1474, in Weston, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 16 May 1517, in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Washbourne est né en 1451, à Wichenford, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire, avait 11448 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Knivton, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Joan Mitton environ 1474, à Weston, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 16 mai 1517, à Wichenford, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Wichenford, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Washbourne 1451 in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire 11448 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Knivton 32. Er hat um 1474 in Weston, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Mitton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 16. Mai 1517 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Washbourne è nato il nel 1451 nel Wichenford, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire, aveva 11448 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Knivton, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Joan Mitton circa 1474, nel Weston, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 16 maggio 1517, nel Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Washbourneが1451年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウィチェンフォードで生まれた時，父Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershireは11448歳，母Elizabeth Knivtonは32歳であった。約1474年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウエストンでJoan Mittonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1517年5月16日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウィチェンフォードで66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウィチェンフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Washbourne(이)가 1451년 영국 워스스터실르 위천퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire(은)는 11448세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Knivton(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1474년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 웨스턴에서 Joan Mitton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1517년 5월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 위천퍼드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 위천퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Washbourne nasceu em 1451, em Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire, tinha 11448 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Knivton, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Mitton aproximadamente 1474, em Weston, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 16 de maio de 1517, em Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Washbourne родился в 1451 г. в местности вичэнфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire было 11448 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Knivton, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Mitton около 1474 г. в местности вестон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 16 мая 1517 г. в местности вичэнфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности вичэнфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Washbourne nació en 1451, en Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire, tenía 11448 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Knivton, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Joan Mitton aproximadamente 1474, en Weston, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 16 de mayo de 1517, en Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
